parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber
actor Nurse as N
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionUI" as UI
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionController" as CTRL
participant ": Company" as COMP
participant ": AdverseReactionStore" as ARS
participant ": AdverseReactionDTO" as DTO
participant ": AdverseReactionMapper" as MAP
participant ": WaitingRoomStore" as WRS
participant ": AdverseReaction" as AR

activate N
N -> UI : Starts recording adverse reaction
activate UI
UI --> N : asks for data(SNS Number, Adverse Reaction Text)
deactivate UI

N -> UI : types requested data
activate UI
UI -> CTRL : createAdverseReaction(SNSNumber, advReact)
activate CTRL

CTRL -> COMP : wstore = getWaitingRoomStore()
CTRL -> COMP : store = getRecordAdverseReactionStore()
CTRL -> WRS : snsu = getSNSUserInTheWaitingRoomByItsSNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
CTRL -> WRS : vc = getVaccinationCenterBySNSNumber(snsuserNumber)

CTRL -> ARS : ar = createAdverseReaction(snsu, advReact, vc)
activate ARS
ARS --> AR ** : create(snsu,advReact,vc)
deactivate ARS

CTRL -> ARS : validateAdverseReaction(ar)
activate ARS
deactivate ARS

CTRL -> MAP : toDTO(ar)
activate MAP
ref over MAP : SD_AdverseReactionMapper_toDTO
MAP --> CTRL : arDTO
deactivate MAP

CTRL --> UI : arDTO
deactivate CTRL

UI --> N : shows SNS User correspondent to the SNS Number\nand adverse reaction waiting for approval
deactivate UI

N -> UI : confirms action
activate UI
UI -> CTRL : saveAdverseReaction()
activate CTRL

CTRL -> ARS : saveAdverseReaction(ar)
activate ARS
ARS -> ARS : validateAdverseReaction(ar)
activate ARS
deactivate ARS
ARS -> ARS : addAdverseReaction(ar)
activate ARS
deactivate ARS
deactivate ARS

CTRL --> UI
deactivate CTRL

UI --> N : informs oppertion success
deactivate UI
deactivate N

@enduml
```
